recommendations.title: Lavender
recommendations.overview: A photographer struggling with memory loss discovers her pictures may indicate something sinister is hitting close to home.

recommendations.title: The First Temptation of Christ
recommendations.overview: Jesus, who's hitting the big 3-0, brings a surprise guest to meet the family. A Christmas special so wrong it must be from comedians Porta dos Fundos.

recommendations.title: Boiling Point
recommendations.overview: A head chef balances multiple personal and professional crises at a popular restaurant in London.

recommendations.title: The Party
recommendations.overview: A thirteen-year-old French girl deals with moving to a new city and school in Paris, while at the same time her parents are getting a divorce.

recommendations.title: The Cheetah Girls
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Music, TV Movie

recommendations.title: Day for Night
recommendations.overview: A committed filmmaker struggles to complete his latest project while coping with a myriad of crises, personal and professional, among the cast and crew.

recommendations.title: Arab Blues
recommendations.overview: Selma, a psychoanalyst, deals with a cast of colorful new patients after returning home to Tunisia to open a practice.

recommendations.title: Anaconda
recommendations.overview: A group of friends facing mid-life crises head to the rainforest with the intention of remaking their favorite movie from their youth, only to find themselves in a fight for their lives against natural disasters, giant snakes and violent criminals.

recommendations.title: The Sting
recommendations.overview: A novice con man teams up with an acknowledged master to avenge the murder of a mutual friend by pulling off the ultimate big con and swindling a fortune from a big-time mobster.
